properties.query:
D3SOARIncidents_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where IncidentSeverity in ("High", "Critical")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    IncidentNumber,
    IncidentTitle,
    IncidentSeverity,
    IncidentStatus,
    IncidentType,
    IncidentPriority,
    IncidentOwner,
    IncidentCreator,
    IncidentDescription,
    IncidentStage
properties.name: D3 Smart SOAR - High or critical severity incident detected
properties.description: Identifies when a D3 Smart SOAR incident with High or Critical severity is ingested. This helps security teams prioritize response to the most impactful incidents reported by D3 Smart SOAR.
